title: rubus × callithyrsus
intro: Rubus × callithyrsus, also known as the Himalayan blackberry or hybrid blackberry, is a sterile hybrid plant that is a cross between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus procerus). The plant's medicinal properties are derived from its leaves, stems, and roots, which contain anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × callithyrsus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Rubus × callithyrsus can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
